# Insulin Human 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Insulin Human 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Insulin Human</strong> 目前有 <strong>5 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Insulin Human 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of diabetes mellitus.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（99.9%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（99.8%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（99.8%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>opsismodysplasia（99.8%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（99.7%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（99.7%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（99.7%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（99.7%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（99.7%）</li>
<li>diabetic ketoacidosis（98.4%）</li>
<li>permanent neonatal diabetes mellitus（98.3%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus, insulin-dependent, X-linked, susceptibility to（96.2%）</li>
<li>IDDM 1（94.5%）</li>
<li>type 2 diabetes mellitus（75.8%）</li>
<li>pancreatitis（74.2%）</li>
<li>venous insufficiency (disease)（73.8%）</li>
<li>acute kidney failure（70.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
